STATEMENT OF DECISION AFTER BENCH TRIAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DEFENDANTS TO REIMBURSE WAUSAU FOR PAST DEFENSE COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $176,193.23, PLUS PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST. PLAINTIFF WAUSAU SHALL BE ENTITLED TO POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST ON ANY UNPAID DEFENSE COSTS DUE. PARTIES SHALL CONTRIBUTE TO THE PAYMENT OF ALL FUTURE REASONABLE AND NECESSARY DEFENSE COSTS AS OUTLINED IN JUDGMENT; PLAINTIFF WAUSAU SHALL RECOVER COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
